_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Conduct research, analysis, and correlation across a wide variety of all source data sets (indications and warnings).
reference_document_element_description: Conduct periodic data compliance assessments, documenting findings, evidence, risk ratings, and remediation assignments.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-003 (AB, cosine: 0.555), AI-S-002 (AI, cosine: 0.555).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.464). Shared vocabulary: [conduct, data]. DCWF-only terms [across, analysis, correlation, indications, research, sets] vs WIDAI-only terms [assessments, assignments, compliance, documenting, evidence, findings] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.856, R=0.873). Balanced P/R — the 17-word DCWF element and 13-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Conduct research, analysis, and correlation across a wide variety of all source" and "Conduct periodic data compliance assessments, documenting findings, evidence, ri" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.611 > STS 0.464 (gap +0.147). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [conduct, data] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.5%. Shared tokens: [conduct, data]. DCWF-only: [across, analysis, correlation, indications, research, sets]. WIDAI-only: [assessments, assignments, compliance, documenting, evidence, findings].
